person.name: Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Iorwerth ab Owain Gwynedd (or Iorwerth Drwyndwn meaning "the flat-nosed"), also called Edward (c. 1130-1174), was the eldest legitimate son of Owain Gwynedd (the king of Gwynedd) and his first wife Gwladys (Gladys) ferch Llywarch. He married Marared ferch Madog. His son, Llywelyn the Great, eventually united the realm and became known as Llywelyn Fawr and is one of Wales's most famous monarchs. Iorwerth received Nant Conwy as his inheritance from his father, Owain Gwynedd. However, he did not receive the crown succession, as was the normal tradition, because of his nose defect (his sobriquet 'Trwyndwn' means broken-nosed).

«b»Death«/b»
He was killed in battle at Pennant Melangell, in Powys, during the wars deciding the succession following the death of his father.

sourceList.title: Iorwerth ap Owain Gwynedd, "Find A Grave Index"
The history of the princes, the lords marcher, and the ancient nobility of Powys Fadog, and the ancient lords of Arwystli, Cedewen, and Meirionydd by Lloyd, Jacob Youde William, 1816-1887 volume 5

zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd於大約1130年出生在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素時，他的父親Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales44歲，母親Gwladys ferch Llywarch33歲。他於1163年與Margaret de Powys在英國威爾斯安格萊阿福拉福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1174年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯南吉梅朗爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd于大约1130年出生在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素时，他的父亲Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales44岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Llywarch33岁。他于1163年与Margaret de Powys在英国威尔斯安格萊阿福拉福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1174年在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾享年46岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯波斯南吉梅朗爾。

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd was born about 1130, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, was 44 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, was 33. He married Margaret de Powys in 1163, in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1174, in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 46, and was buried in Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd est né environ 1130, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Powys en 1163, à Aberffraw, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1174, à Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd um 1130 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales 44 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Llywarch 33. Er hat 1163 in Aberffraw, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Margaret de Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1174 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales und wurde in Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd è nato il circa 1130 nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Powys nel 1163, nel Aberffraw, Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1174, nel Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwyneddが約1130年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルで生まれた時，父Owain Gwynedd King of all Walesは44歳，母Gwladys ferch Llywarchは33歳であった。1163年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウでMargaret de Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1174年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアペナント-メランジェルで46歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスペナント-メランジェルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd(이)가 대략 1130년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Llywarch(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1163년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤에서 Margaret de Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1174년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 펜넌트-멀랭에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스 펜넌트-멀랭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Powys em 1163, em Aberffraw, Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1174, em Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd родился около 1130 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Llywarch, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Powys в 1163 г. в местности абирффрав, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1174 г. в местности пеннант-мелангелл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности пеннант-мелангелл, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd nació aproximadamente 1130, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Llywarch, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret de Powys en 1163, en Aberffraw, Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1174, en Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Pennant-Melangell, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
